tips: Use your weapon and the props refreshed in the map to kill you enemies.
info.head: Team Kills
hint.already: You can't keep this again since you already have one.
hint.buy: s. You can buy things in the shop list.
hint.arrive: You have arrived at the battlefield!
right_click_data: Right click to view your profile
intro.name: Name:
intro.laser.l1:
A rapid-firing rifle, 
with a small and stable recoil,
intro.laser.l2:
yet it deals a little damage. 
If you are good at controlling it,
intro.laser.l3: it can help you kill enemies as fast as possible.
intro.snipe.l1: A sniper rifle with an extremely slow firing rate and a big recoil.
intro.snipe.l2: Yet it deals great damage that can instantly kill an opponent.
intro.snipe.l3: If you can fire accurately, you can kill enemies with ease.
intro.shotgun.l1: A shotgun with a medium firing rate and a medium recoil.
intro.shotgun.l2: But it can also deals explosive damage by 2 blocks.
intro.shotgun.l3: It has a good killing efficiency in a short distance.
intro.reconnaissance:
A slowly-firing rifle with a medium recoil.
But it deals rather great damage and causes 2s of glowing of enemies you hit.
High killing efficiency.
intro.armor.piercing.l1:
A middle-firing-rate rifle with a rather high damage.
 It's recoil is large but with a good piercing power. With a proficient shooting,
 you can have a great killing efficiency.
intro.walker.l1:
A fast-firing rifle with a low damage.
 It's recoil is a bit large, Yet with good controlling,
 you can have a great killing efficiency.
reload.0.1.9: You can play with the normal game!(Ver. 0.1.9 pre-released)

gun.reconnaissance.l1: Dealing great damage, and you can see the enemy
gun.walker.l1: Dealing great damage but hard to control
gun.kalashnikov.l1: Fast firing rate, hard to control
gun.pistol.l1: What do you expect from it?
prop.minecart.l1: Makes a breakthrough with its flying ability!
